title: Death House Rescue
description: The Shadow must race against time to save an innocent man from the electric chair, uncovering a web of corruption that reaches into the highest halls of justice.

title: Murder By The Dead
description: When a supposedly dead man begins committing murders, Lamont Cranston and Margo Lane must unravel a sinister scheme of faked deaths and very real killings.

title: The Temple Bells of Neban
description: A mysterious Eastern temple in the heart of the city holds dark secrets, and its haunting bells toll for those marked for death.

title: The Three Ghosts
description: On a night when the veil between worlds grows thin, three spectral figures terrorize a household — but The Shadow suspects a very human hand behind the haunting.

title: The Circle of Death
description: Members of a secret society are being murdered one by one in a tightening circle of death, and only The Shadow can break the deadly pattern.

title: The Death Triangle
description: Three points on a map mark three murders, forming a triangle of terror that points to a mastermind's next deadly move.

title: The Voice Of Death
description: A disembodied voice delivers death sentences over the radio, and its victims die precisely as predicted. The Shadow must silence this voice before it strikes again.

title: The League of Terror
description: A ruthless criminal organization uses fear as its weapon, extorting the city's wealthiest citizens. The Shadow infiltrates their ranks to destroy them from within.

title: Sabotage
description: Industrial saboteurs threaten to cripple the nation's factories, and The Shadow must stop their campaign of destruction before it's too late.

title: The Society of the Living Dead
description: A secret society promises eternal life to its members, but the price of immortality is murder — and The Shadow must expose their deadly fraud.

title: The Poison Death
description: A brilliant chemist has created an undetectable poison, and someone is using it to eliminate enemies one by one. The Shadow must find the killer before the poison claims another victim.

title: The Phantom Voice
description: A ghostly voice drives its listeners to madness and murder. Is it supernatural, or has someone found a terrifying new weapon of psychological terror?

title: The House Of Horror
description: A decrepit mansion on the edge of town has claimed the lives of all who enter. When Margo Lane goes missing inside, The Shadow must brave its horrors to save her.

title: Hounds in the Hills
description: In the remote hill country, savage hounds hunt human prey at the command of a mysterious master. The Shadow tracks the pack to its lair.

title: The Plot Murder
description: A murder mystery playwright discovers that his latest plot has come to life — someone is committing the murders he wrote, exactly as scripted.

title: The Bride of Death
description: A beautiful young woman's husbands keep dying on their wedding night, and The Shadow must determine if she is victim or villain before another groom meets his fate.

title: The Silent Avenger
description: A mute vigilante is dispensing brutal justice across the city, targeting criminals the law cannot touch. But The Shadow knows that vengeance and justice are not the same.

title: The White Legion
description: A band of hooded figures calling themselves The White Legion terrorizes an entire community, and only The Shadow dares to stand against their reign of fear.

title: The Hypnotized Audience
description: A stage hypnotist's act turns deadly when his entranced audience members begin committing crimes they cannot remember. The Shadow must break the spell.

title: Death From the Deep
description: Something monstrous lurks beneath the harbor waters, dragging ships and sailors to their doom. The Shadow dives into the depths to confront a terror from the deep.
